claims.subject: HelixPay engagement objective
claims.evidence: A system that lets our internal agents — exec-briefing bots, sales-prep agents, support copilots — answer questions about HelixPay reliably, with sources. Not a search engine. An ontology with retrieval.
claims.object_value: Ontology with retrieval enabling internal agents (exec-briefing bots, sales-prep agents, support copilots) to answer questions about HelixPay reliably with sources
